steps.title: Rewrite the target
steps.content:
The question gives the value of $5x$, not $x$ by itself. Since the target expression is $30x$, rewrite $30x$ as a multiple of $5x$. Because $30=6\cdot5$, the target can be written this way:
$$30x=6(5x)$$

steps.title: Substitute the given value
steps.content: The equation says $5x=8$, so substitute $8$ for the entire expression $5x$. This avoids solving for $x$ separately and goes directly to the requested value: $$30x=6(8)=48$$ The answer is D.
